headline: NFL draft prospect Zachariah Branch arrested in Georgia
description: Wide receiver Zachariah Branch, who is widely expected to be a Day 2 NFL draft pick, was arrested early Sunday morning in Athens, Georgia, on two possible misdemeanor charges.

headline: Sources: Giants trade DT Lawrence to Bengals for No. 10 pick
